monitor.capture_what: files created or modified by the target function, specifically their contents checked for cleartext SSN patterns (e.g., \d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}) and credit card number patterns (13-19 consecutive digits)

oracle_check.condition_description: A newly created or modified file contains cleartext sensitive data patterns — specifically SSN in NNN-NN-NNNN format or credit card numbers (13-19 digit sequences) stored without encryption or hashing, as written by json.dumps via write_text
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_CLEAR-TEXT-STORAGE-SENSITIVE-DATA: cleartext sensitive data written to file — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
